overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long UUUU Daily ETF (UUUG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Energy Fuels Inc. (NYSE: UUUU) stock, less fees, and expenses UUUG was launched on Jan 13, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
